title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd!
